_comment: Declarative workflow definition for feed-curator. Keeps the education-feeds catalog accurate by validating existing feeds, discovering candidates, proposing a human-reviewable change set, and auto-applying only mechanically-safe repairs — all logged for audit/revert.
description: Catalog librarian: validate feeds → discover candidates → propose changes → auto-apply safe repairs → audit log → quality gate

steps.note: Check each feed URL for liveness, staleness, redirects, label accuracy
RSS autodiscovery (rel=alternate); polite, robots.txt-respecting; candidates are proposals, never auto-added
Classify changes as mechanical (safe) or judgment (human review); auto-apply only safe repairs

note: Every change — auto or approved — is appended to ledger/feeds-change-log.json and is reversible with --revert. Only tier:canonical / authority:primary confirms a change. Never fabricate a feed URL or verified status.
